ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the country is located */,
  "income_level" INTEGER /* Income level of the country (e.g., low-income, middle-income, high-income) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official or primary language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_income_level FOREIGN KEY ("income_level") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., poverty rate, education level) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was measured */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of economic indicator (e.g., poverty, education, health) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government agency, international organization) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value (e.g., percentage, dollars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_rates" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty rate */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the poverty rate belongs to */,
  "usd_125" REAL /* Poverty rate based on $1.25 a day */,
  "out_of_school" REAL /* Percentage of children out of school */,
  "below_height" REAL /* Percentage of children below height for age */,
  "below_weight" REAL /* Percentage of children below weight for age */,
  "mpi" REAL /* Multidimensional poverty index (MPI) */,
  "poverty_threshold" REAL /* Poverty threshold used for the measurement */,
  "urban_poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in urban areas */,
  "rural_poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in rural areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the education level belongs to */,
  "primary" REAL /* Percentage of children in primary education */,
  "secondary" REAL /* Percentage of children in secondary education */,
  "tertiary" REAL /* Percentage of children in tertiary education */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate of the population */,
  "enrollment_rate" REAL /* Overall enrollment rate in educational institutions */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate from higher education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the health metric belongs to */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate */,
  "malaria_rate" REAL /* Malaria rate */,
  "hiv_rate" REAL /* HIV rate */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy */,
  "healthcare_expenditure" REAL /* Total healthcare expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., public, private) */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the data was shared with */,
  "shared_with_user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user the data was shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level (e.g., low-income, middle-income, high-income) */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range of the income level (e.g., $0-$1000, $1001-$5000, $5001-$10000) */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the income range */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the income range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Asia, Africa, Europe) */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the region (e.g., Southeast Asia, Northern Africa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
